rule: Do NOT send until approved by Auditor (Task 10). Only prospects with score >=90 can be sent.

I built a free FIRE calculator and retirement planning tool that would fit perfectly alongside your existing resources — no signup, no data collection, just clean interactive tools for your readers. Want me to send the embed codes?

Your financial literacy resources help teachers across the country. I have free classroom-friendly calculators (compound interest, budget, retirement) students can use on any device — no signup, no ads, just clean educational tools. Would these be useful for your educator resources?
